post.description:
The `eventType` can be one of the following: `START` for start order process, `END` for end of oreder process, `IN`, `OUT`, `REPLACE`, `RETURN`, `EXPIRED`
You can send any event if and only if the `START` event has been sent and after `END` event you can not send anything

The `documentType` can be one of the following: `SALES_DOCUMENT`, `PURCHASE_DOCUMENT`, `INVENTORY_REGISTRATION`, `INVENTORY_WRITE_OFF`, `INVENTORY_TRANSFER`, `ASSIGNMENT`.

In case of `START` or `END` events binInventoryRecordId value can be 0

get.description: The `documentType` can be one of the following: `SALES_DOCUMENT`, `PURCHASE_DOCUMENT`, `INVENTORY_REGISTRATION`, `INVENTORY_WRITE_OFF`, `INVENTORY_TRANSFER`, `ASSIGNMENT`.

put.description: Update batch and add batch codes. Leave "batchId" empty if you want to add more batch codes.

get.description:
Possible to order by field and sort by ASC or DESC. Add order like that ?order=binId ASC
Search multiple binID's and productID's like that ?binId=1,3,5,6&productId=2,5

post.description:
The `referenceType` can be one of the following: `SALES_DOCUMENT`, `PURCHASE_DOCUMENT`, `INVENTORY_REGISTRATION`, `INVENTORY_WRITE_OFF`, `INVENTORY_TRANSFER`, `ASSIGNMENT`.
If you add `referenceType`, then `referenceId` parameter is a mandatory field. Or, if you add `referenceId`, then `referenceType` parameter is a mandatory field.

put.description:
The `referenceType` can be one of the following: `SALES_DOCUMENT`, `PURCHASE_DOCUMENT`, `INVENTORY_REGISTRATION`, `INVENTORY_WRITE_OFF`, `INVENTORY_TRANSFER`, `ASSIGNMENT`.
If you add `referenceType`, then `referenceId` parameter is a mandatory field. Or, if you add `referenceId`, then `referenceType` parameter is a mandatory field.
NB: The following fields cannot be updated: `ID`, `BinID`, `ProductID`, `BatchID`, `Amount`.

statusCode.description: Operation Status code - equivalent to http 2xx codes series
